summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PIR GRAIN & PULSES commodity trading dashboard. All backend APIs working perfectly (38/38 tests passed). Frontend UI fully functional with proper authentication, navigation, and all required features implemented correctly.
passed_tests: Login with salihkaragoz/salih123 - redirects to dashboard correctly
Login error handling - shows 'Invalid credentials' for wrong credentials
Dashboard KPI cards - shows Upcoming Events (3), Completed Trades (0), Active Trades (5), Pending Trades (3)
Sidebar navigation - light background, PIR GRAIN & PULSES logo, all nav items present
Header bar - shows notification bell, user initials (SK), user name (Salih Karagoz)
Trades page - all 5 categorized sections with colored borders (Ongoing/Pending/Completed/Washout/Cancelled)
Trades page - search functionality working, multi-filter dropdowns present
Trades page - New Trade button working, navigates to /trades/new
New Trade page - all form sections present (Trade Parties, Commodity Details, Pricing & Terms, Shipping)
Partners page - tabs for All/Sellers/Buyers/Co-Brokers with counts, Add Partner button
Partners page - table with company data, contact info, email links, phone numbers, location, type badges
Vessels page - stats cards (3 Total Vessels, 8 yrs Average Age, 3 Unique Flags), vessel table with IMO numbers
Calendar page - custom month grid, events display, Add Event button, event list sidebar
Commissions page - summary cards, categorized brokerage tables
Reports page - charts (pie chart for status distribution, bar chart for commodity volume), summary stats
Settings page - Profile info, tabs for Commodities/Origins/Ports/Surveyors/Users with CRUD functionality
All backend APIs working (38/38 tests passed) - trades, partners, vessels, documents, reference data, events
Logout functionality working - redirects to login page
